title: Changsha, Hunan — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Changsha, Hunan: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Changsha is a city in Hunan with a population of 10,047,000. Capital of Hunan province, known for its spicy cuisine, vibrant entertainment industry, and the hometown of Mao Zedong.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
